title: AIDA: AI Agent for Aramco
description: Worked on an AI agent for Aramco as part of the Beyond Limits Company
details: Added TTS, ASR functionalities using fast-whisper, socket events, and other wall commands
Used a microfrontend-like architecture to display charts on the main screen

title: TaskFlow: Simple Task Tracker
description: Offline-first task tracker with real-time sync across devices
details: Built with TanStack Router, React 19, Zustand, Vite, shadcn, TailwindCSS
Offline-first architecture using IndexedDB with Supabase sync
PWA support with conflict resolution for shared boards
Last-write-win approach for handling collaborative conflicts
